honest-design/src/honest_design/reader.p: equivalent: a function has exactly one signature and a signature exactly one params node, so [0] and [-1] address the same element.
equivalent: a function_decl has exactly one signature child, so [0] and [-1] address the same element.
equivalent: a chain_decl has exactly one chain_body child, so [0] and [-1] address the same element.
equivalent: a flow_decl has exactly one flow_body child, so [0] and [-1] address the same element.
equivalent: a module has at most one layer and the fallback list has exactly one element, so [0] and [-1] address the same element.
equivalent: a route path is 'METHOD /path' with a single space; split(' ', 1) and split(' ', 2) yield the same parts, so the limit is unobservable on valid input.
honest-design/src/honest_design/result.p: equivalent: total=False on a TypedDict is a static-typing directive with no runtime effect (TypedDict performs no validation at construction), so flipping it to True cannot change any value the suite observes.
